rent.note: furnished 1BR in Blloku or Vake; 40,000–60,000 lek (~$350–$520)

groceries.note: home cooking; fresh produce very cheap

diningOut.note: Blloku district cafes and restaurants; good value

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; Tirana has a growing coworking scene

simData.note: Albanian SIM; One or Vodafone; very cheap

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Inland capital; moderate seasonality.

evidence.quote: Rent prices in Blloku are around 40,000-60,000 lek ($350-$520 USD) per month for a one-bedroom apartment

evidence.claim: solo nomad $900–$1,500/mo all-in comfortable; budget possible at $700
evidence.quote: A single expat can live comfortably in Tirana for $900–$1,500/month

evidence.claim: Tirana notably affordable; monthly expenses ex-rent £520–£620 ($700–$800)
evidence.quote: A single person's monthly expenses, excluding rent, fall between £520 ($700) and £620 ($800), which includes groceries, utilities, transport, and dining

evidence.claim: Tirana digital nomad guide 2026 confirms affordable rents and growing coworking
evidence.quote: Tirana Digital Nomad Guide 2026: Costs & Neighborhoods
